# FOSS for Enterprise

> A Quarto RevealJS presentation by Indrajeet Patil.

Understanding Free and Open Source Software for enterprise: licenses, risks, and automated tools for managing open source dependencies.

## Primary URL

- [Slides](https://www.indrapatil.com/foss-for-enterprise/)

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/foss-for-enterprise/)

## Topics

- FOSS
- open source
- enterprise
- software licensing
- security
- free open source software
- presentation
- slides
